instruction: Add an optional `default` parameter with a sentinel default value (e.g. use `_SENTINEL = object()` at module level and `default=_SENTINEL`). When `nums` is empty and `default` is not the sentinel, return `default` instead of raising `ValueError`. When `nums` is empty and no `default` is provided, continue to raise `ValueError` (original behaviour). All other behaviour (finding the first index of the maximum value in a non-empty list) must remain unchanged.
